field_attributes.category: Artifact category (resource, segment, metric, or attribute).
field_attributes.data_type: The underlying data type of the field.
field_attributes.filterable: Whether the field can be used in GAQL WHERE conditions.
field_attributes.repeated: Whether the field returns a repeated/list value.
field_attributes.selectable: Whether the field can be selected in GAQL SELECT.
field_attributes.sortable: Whether the field can be used in GAQL ORDER BY.
field_attributes.type: The typed field classification exposed by Google Ads API metadata.
field_attributes.url: Canonical URL for field metadata documentation.

overview: Google Ads Query Language (GAQL) reference for API v23.
